title: Flaky Test Registry & Improved Orphan Check
requirements:
Reduce false positives from flaky tests and grep-based orphan detection.

1. Create schemas/flaky-tests.schema.json with fields:
   - version (integer), last_updated (ISO 8601), entries array with: id (flaky-NNN), test_name (full test name or pattern), file (nullable), repo (project key), first_seen (ISO 8601), last_seen (ISO 8601), occurrences (integer >= 1), status (enum: active, resolved, permanent), notes (nullable)

2. Create scripts/flaky-test.sh:
   - Actions: check <test_name> <repo> (returns {flaky: true/false}), record <test_name> <repo> [--file path] (add/update entry in per-repo registry at runs/flaky-tests/{repo_name}.json), retry <ticket_id> <repo> (re-run failed tests matching flaky registry)
   - Flaky tests get one automatic retry before being treated as real failures
   - Non-flaky test failures are always real

3. Integrate flaky tests into QA pipeline:
   - Update agents/qa-agent.md: after test failure, check flaky registry before reporting fail
   - Update CLAUDE.md QA pipeline: add flaky test check between test failure and retry/escalation
   - Update agents/pr-monitor.md: CI failures checked against flaky registry

4. Create scripts/orphan-check-ts.js as standalone TypeScript compiler API bundle:
   - For each file changed by base branch: find all exports removed/renamed, find all references in feature branch files, report: file, export name, referencing files, reference count
   - Falls back to orphan-check.sh (grep-based) for non-TypeScript repos
   - Output: same JSON format as orphan-check.sh

5. Scope orphan check to feature files only:
   - Update orphan-check.sh: filter analysis to only files listed in PRD.json files_affected
   - Accept PRD.json path as argument
   - Update REPAIR_KNOWLEDGE.json: promote repair-2 to 'high' confidence

6. Update conflict resolution pipeline:
   - Update conflict-resolution.sh: try orphan-check-ts.js first, fall back to orphan-check.sh
   - Selection based on tsconfig.json existence in worktree

7. Write tests for all new functionality
acceptance_criteria: schemas/flaky-tests.schema.json exists with all required fields
scripts/flaky-test.sh supports check, record, and retry actions
Flaky tests get one automatic retry before being treated as real failures
QA agent checks flaky registry before reporting test failures
PR monitor checks CI failures against flaky registry
scripts/orphan-check-ts.js exists as standalone TypeScript compiler API bundle
orphan-check.sh accepts PRD.json path and scopes analysis to feature files only
conflict-resolution.sh tries TS orphan check first, falls back to grep-based
REPAIR_KNOWLEDGE.json repair-2 promoted to high confidence
